title: selaginella pubens
intro: Selaginella pubens is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, also known as a spikemoss. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella pubens are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and enhancing immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and allergic reactions.
